# CPListItemPlayingIndicatorLocation.leading

**Case**

Align the Now Playing indicator with the leading edge of the list item.

## Declaration

```swift
case leading
```

## Now Playing Indicator Locations

- **CPListItemPlayingIndicatorLocation.trailing**: Align the Now Playing indicator with the trailing edge of the list item.

items.description: Align the Now Playing indicator with the trailing edge of the list item.
